'''daguru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanoglucoside|cyanoglucoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanoglucoside|cyanoglucoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| daguru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dægirith|dægirith]] || [[word:dægirij|dægirij]] || [[word:dægirish|dægirish]] || [[word:dægiri|dægiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:daguguruth|daguguruth]] || [[word:daguguruj|daguguruj]] || [[word:dagugurush|dagugurush]] || [[word:daguguru|daguguru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:daguruth|daguruth]] || [[word:daguruj|daguruj]] || [[word:dagurush|dagurush]] || [[word:daguru|daguru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dagufruth|dagufruth]] || [[word:dagufruj|dagufruj]] || [[word:dagufrush|dagufrush]] || [[word:dagufruf|dagufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daguruthu|daguruthu]] || [[word:daguruju|daguruju]] || [[word:dagurushu|dagurushu]] || [[word:daguruku|daguruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daguruth|daguruth]] || [[word:daguruj|daguruj]] || [[word:dagurush|dagurush]] || [[word:daguru|daguru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daguruthul|daguruthul]] || [[word:dagurujul|dagurujul]] || [[word:dagurushul|dagurushul]] || [[word:dagurukul|dagurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daguruthuthu|daguruthuthu]] || [[word:dagurujuju|dagurujuju]] || [[word:dagurushushu|dagurushushu]] || [[word:daguruku|daguruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daguruthun|daguruthun]] || [[word:dagurujun|dagurujun]] || [[word:dagurushun|dagurushun]] || [[word:dagurukun|dagurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daguruthuoro|daguruthuoro]] || [[word:dagurujuoro|dagurujuoro]] || [[word:dagurushuoro|dagurushuoro]] || [[word:dagurukuoro|dagurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
